events.title: Comedy Allstars
events.description: Rotating lineup of Bay Area and touring stand-up comedians. Punch Line's Monday night showcase format — good variety, tight sets.

events.title: Heavenly
events.description: London indie pop band and their distinctly melodic, wry sound. GAMH is one of the best mid-size rooms in the city — ornate balconies, good sightlines.

events.title: Scott Capurro Has Friends
events.description: SF comedy veteran Scott Capurro hosts with guest comedians. Sharp, often provocative — not for every crowd, but always memorable.

events.title: Zach Noe Towers
events.description: Stand-up comedian known for wry observational humor and deadpan delivery. Thursday headliner show.

events.title: 2nd Thursday Salsa Social
events.description: Monthly salsa social with live music or DJ, open floor for all levels. Mission neighborhood dance community staple.

events.title: Zach Noe Towers
events.description: Zach Noe Towers continues his Punch Line run — Friday show has an earlier start time.

events.title: This Charming Band
events.description: One of the most accurate Smiths/Morrissey tribute acts in the world, consistently sold-out at GAMH. 'There Is a Light That Never Goes Out' performed exactly as intended.

events.title: Dance Fridays
events.description: SF's long-running weekly salsa and Latin dance event. Instruction at 7:45 PM, social dancing until late. All levels welcome, large floor, excellent DJs.

events.title: Moleskine Project XIII — Opening Reception
events.description: 13th edition of the global Moleskine artist collaboration — curated works created in Moleskine notebooks by artists worldwide. Opening reception at Hashimoto Contemporary, Minnesota Street Project.

events.title: Introductions — Opening Reception
events.description: Group show introducing emerging artists to the Bay Area gallery circuit. Opening reception at Ruth Asawa Lanier gallery within Minnesota Street Project.

events.title: Wheelchair Sports Camp
events.description: Oakland hip-hop collective led by Kalyn Heffernan — wheelchair user, disability justice advocate, and genuinely powerful performer. Critically acclaimed live show.

events.title: Memory Cradle
events.description: Ongoing exhibition through July 18 at Eleanor Harwood Gallery within Minnesota Street Project. Works exploring memory, material, and personal archive. Wed–Sat 11am–5pm.

events.title: Mark Perlman — Recent Works
events.description: Ongoing exhibition through July 18 at Nancy Toomey Fine Art, Minnesota Street Project. Paintings drawing from landscape and abstraction.

events.title: Japanese Breakfast at Stern Grove
events.description: Michelle Zauner's Michelle Zauner-led indie rock project headlining Stern Grove's free outdoor amphitheater. Lottery tickets were required and are sold out — check the wait list or arrive early for standby.

events.title: Bird & Beckett Sunday Jazz
events.description: Weekly Sunday afternoon jazz sessions at the beloved Glen Park bookstore and record shop. Intimate space, rotating local musicians, free with a suggested donation. Doors at 3:30 PM.

events.title: SalsaCrazy Mondays
events.description: Weekly salsa social in the Richmond. Class at 6:30 PM, social dancing until 10 PM. Consistent crowd, multi-level, welcoming to newcomers.
